metadata.title: Meezan Visa Infinite Debit Card | Meezan Bank
metadata.description:
Meezan Visa Infinite Debit Card
There is something that sets you apart. It is your character – the inner you who dares to dream and chases ambition, pushing you to prosper in every endeavour. Meezan Visa Infinite Debit Card bears testimony to the achievements you have already accomplished and serves as a hallmark of the distinct path you continue to walk. It brings you a curated range of benefits including rare experiences, exclusive offers, and unique advantages – as unique as you are.

content: Meezan EBiz+ LITE Login Meezan EBiz+ Login EBiz+ LITE Login EBiz+ Login اردو If you found this page informative, share it now! Facebook LinkedIn X WhatsApp Email Print Infinite Debit Card Unique In Nature, Just Like You There is something that sets you apart. It is your character – the inner you who dares to dream and chases ambition, pushing you to prosper in every endeavour. Infinite Debit Card bears testimony to the achievements you have already accomplished and serves as a hallmark of the distinct path you continue to walk. It brings you a curated range of benefits including rare experiences, exclusive offers, and unique advantages – as unique as you are. Features & Benefits Lounges Experience personalized travel with your Meezan Visa Infinite Card, with access to over 1,200 airport lounges worldwide. Cardholders enjoy unlimited entries. 1 guest gets complimentary access. View Details Meet & Assist Services YQ is a global network of specialist airport meet & assist service partners. For Meezan Visa Infinite Cardholders, it provides personalized greeting and exceptional airport experience: Discount of up to 25% off retail rates at over 450 destinations globally. Cardholders can also book other services such as limo transfer, visa on arrival, baggage porters, etc. View Details Avis Car Rentals Avis Budget Group operates one of the world’s best-known car rental brands with a truly global footprint. Following discounts and privileges at Budget are available for Meezan Visa Infinite Cardholders: Up to 35% discount on Standard Rates. Up to 30% off on Retail Rates. View Details Concierge The 24-hour concierge provides a personal service to Visa Infinite Cardholders, taking care of all the details so they can simply take their seats and enjoy. Restaurant advice Booking tables, including those that are hard-to-get Travel arrangements: booking flights, hotels, car rental, hotel transfers, tourist advice Shopping recommendations, sourcing a product Arranging a special gift, sending flowers View Details Digital Concierge With Meezan Visa Infinite, cardholders have access to a digital concierge channel in addition to telephone and email service. The digital concierge is a fully mobile responsive portal, enabling you to search and book on-the-go. Cardholders will also be able to talk to Visa Lifestyle Managers any time of day and night via the Live Chat. Browse and book flights, hotels, car rental on-the-go. Reserve tables online via a click of button in premium restaurants, those that are hard-to-get. Browse through the collection of benefits covering vast range of products and services. View Details Discounts & Privileges With the Visa Infinite Card, you have access to the most exclusive discounts and privileges. Choose from over a wide selection of discounts at the best dining & lifestyle brands across the country. Click here to view more details Complimentary Access at Over 1000 International Airport Lounges Live the high life, before you take to the sky. airport lounges worldwide. Access is complimentary for the cardholder + 1 guest. Download the Visa Airport Companion App to see the full list of lounges. Airport Companion App on iOS and Android. For more information, please Click here Some of these airports include: ABU DHABI (AUH) Airport Name: Abu Dhabi International Airport Lounges Name: Diamond Lounge VIP Terminal: VIP Terminal Access: Show Infinite Debit Card at participating lounges and mention the LoungeKey program to gain access. Free access to cardholder and a guest. AMMAN (AMM) Airport Name: Queen Alia International Lounges Name: Crown Lounge (Royal Jordanian) Terminal: Main and a guest. AMSTERDAM (AMS) Airport Name: Amsterdam Schiphol Lounges Name: Aspire Lounge (No.41) Terminal: Terminal 3 and a guest. BANGKOK (BKK) Airport Name: Bangkok Suvarnabhumi Intl Lounges Name: Miracle First Class Lounge Terminal: International Concourse G and a guest. BARCELONA (BCN) Airport Name: Barcelona El Prat Lounges Name: Sala VIP Miro Terminal: Terminal 1 and a guest. BRUSSELS (BRU) Airport Name: Brussels Name: Diamond Lounge and a guest. CAIRO (CAI) Airport Name: Cairo International Lounges Name: Class Lounge Terminal: Terminal 2 & and a guest. CASABLANCA (CMN) Airport Name: Casablanca Mohammed V Intl Lounges Name: Pearl Lounge (Departures) Terminal: Terminal 2 and a guest. DUBAI (DWC) Airport Name: Dubai Al Maktoum Intl Lounges Name: Marhaba Terminal: Terminal 2 Airport Name: Dubai Intl Terminal: Terminal 1 Concourse D Terminal 3 Concourse A Terminal 3 Concourse B Terminal 3 Concourse C and a guest. FRANKFURT (FRA) Airport Name: Frankfurt Main Lounges Name: Sky and a guest. HONG KONG SAR (HKG) Airport Name: Hong Kong Chek Lap Kok Intl Lounges Name: Plaza Premium Lounge and a guest. ISTANBUL (IST) Airport Name: Istanbul Ataturk Lounges Name: IGA Lounge Terminal: International and a guest. JEDDAH (JED) Airport Name: Jeddah King A Aziz Intl Class Lounge Terminal: North and a guest. KUALA LUMPUR (KUL) Airport Name: Kuala Lumpur Premium Lounge Terminal: KLIA1 (Satellite) and a guest. KUWAIT (KWI) Airport Name: Kuwait International Lounges Name: Dasman Premier Lounge Terminal: Terminal M and a guest. LONDON (LHR) Airport Name: London Heathrow Lounges Name: Aspire, The Lounge at LHR T5 Terminal: Terminal 5 and a guest. NEW YORK (NY) (JFK) Airport Name: New York John F.Kennedy International Lounges Name: Air India Maharaja Lounge Terminal: Terminal 4 and a guest. PARIS (CDG) Airport Name: Paris-Orly Airport Lounges Name: Icare Lounge Terminal: Orly and a guest. ROME (FCO) Airport Name: Rome Fiumicino Lounges Name: Prima Vista Lounge and a guest. SINGAPORE (SIN) Airport Name: Singapore Changi Intl Lounges Name: SATS and a guest. TORONTO (YYZ) Airport Name: Toronto Lester B. Pearson Plaza Premium Lounge (Int'l Departures) and a guest. Show More Dear Customer, to avail complimentary lounge access, please notify the Bank of your travel plan one day prior to the departure date by calling our 24/7 toll free number at 111-331-331/2 Fees, Charges & Transaction Limits The Infinite Debit Card features the highest spending & withdrawal limits so you have round-the-clock accessibility to your funds whenever you need them. Annual Charges Meezan VISA Infinite Debit Card Infinite Debit Card (Eligible Premium customers) As per the Schedule of Charges (SOCs) Free * *Eligibility Criteria Account Category Criteria for Premium Customers Bank Accounts Equivalent to PKR 15 Million or more Term Deposit Certificates Equivalent to PKR 20 Million or more Bank Accounts & Million or more Card Replacement Charges (Lost, Stolen, Damaged) Infinite Debit Card of Charges (SOCs) ATM Charges Cash Withdrawal (on 1Link ATMs other than MBL) Rs. 23.44 per Transaction Cash Withdrawal (on other switches) Transaction Cash Withdrawal (International) 4% of Transaction Amount or Rs. 600 per Transaction, whichever is higher Balance Inquiry (on MNET ATMs) Rs. 5 per Inquiry Balance Inquiry (on International ATMs) Rs. 300 per Inquiry POS Charges Local Purchase Free International Purchase 4% of Transaction Amount** Visa / MasterCard Arbitration Charges (False Charge backs – local & international) USD 500 or Rs. equivalent per case Document Retrieval Charges Local Rs. 200 per Document International Rs. 1,000 per Document VISA Infinite – Transaction Limits Transaction Type Channel Single Transaction Limit Per Day Limit Cash Withdrawal Meezan Bank ATM Rs. 100,000 Rs. 700,000 Cash Withdrawal Other Bank ATM* Rs. 50,000 Rs. 700,000 POS/ E-Commerce/ NFC*** ALL Rs. 5,000,000 Rs. 5,000,000 Inter Bank Funds Transfer ATM Rs. 1,000,000 Bank Funds Transfer IB & MB 5,000,000 Rs. 5,000,000 Third Party Funds Transfer (within Meezan) 1,000,000 Transfer (within Meezan) 5,000,000 Rs. 5,000,000 Own Account Funds Transfer ALL 1,000,000 Rs. 5,000,000 RAAST & MB Rs. 500,000 Rs. 5,000,000 RAAST & MB Rs. 5,000,000 RAAST Account 1,000,000 Rs. 5,000,000 *Subject to withdrawal limits of respective 1link member banks **As per SBP directives, effective from November 8th, 2022, an industry-wide limit of USD 30,000 (or equivalent) per individual is applicable on card based cross-border transactions. You are therefore advised to monitor your international spending to keep it within this Annual Limit. Further, please note that card based transactions may only be conducted for personal use. In addition to this, Advance Tax on International transactions will be applied as follows: Filer: 5% and Non-Filer: 10%. For details, please call (021) 111-331-331 / 111-331-332 ***For NFC (Contactless) transactions, single transaction limits are set by the acquiring bank (merchant's bank) and may vary from the limits mentioned above. ATM Networks Meezan Bank offers a nation-wide network of ATMs located at its branches and prominent offsite locations. There is no need to carry cash anymore; simply go to the ATM and withdraw cash anywhere, anytime. We also offer access to more than 8,000 ATMs country-wide via 1Link and MNET Networks. FAQs What is a Visa Debit Card Visa Debit Card is an internationally accepted Visa ATM/Debit Card that is linked to your Meezan Bank account, allowing spending on shopping outlets and cash withdrawals at ATMs. What is the difference between a debit and credit card? Visa Debit Card allows you to pay for your purchases using your own money through the Visa network, while a credit card provides you with the ability to access credit, which you then repay at a later date. This means with Visa Debit Card you can access the Visa network your own money without worrying about receiving a credit card bill at the end of each month. How do I make a purchase with my debit card? On your purchase the cashier will ‘swipe’ the card and give you a charge slip. Check the transaction amount and sign the slip. Once the transaction is complete, the amount will be deducted from your Meezan Bank account. For how long is my card valid? The validity period of the card is 5 years from the date of issue. The card expiry month is mentioned on the front of the card. How do I change my ATM pin? You can generate your ATM PIN by calling up our 24/7 call center on 111-331-331 or 111-331-332 (from outside Pakistan call +92-21 111-331-331 or 111-331-332) and follow the directions through IVR (interactive voice response). You may also change your ATM PIN any time by visiting the nearest Meezan Bank ATM. What should I do if my card gets stolen or lost? If you become aware that your debit card is lost or stolen, immediately call 111-331-331 or 111-331-332) to report loss or theft. You are protected from financial liability arising from any unauthorised transaction done on your card after being reported lost/stolen. We will cancel your old card and order a new one for you straight away. Downloads Schedule of Charges Guidelines for ATM users Terms and Conditions For Infinite Card Visa Dispute Form MeezanGPT Assalam o Alaikum! How can I be of service to you today?
